meaning: n.[修辞]表面否认要说或正说的话
examples: The attorney's use of apophasis aimed to discredit his rival without accusing him of anything outright.
Apophasis Allusion to something by denying that it will be mentioned, as in I will not bring up my opponent's questionable financial dealings.
There's been a lot of talk about Watergate lately, most of it unintentional apophasis (or "Bimbo, " to use the technical term).
